name: source-file format: each entry of rules: array must conform to §2.1 rubric rule schema with full E-8 metadata (type, fixable, has_suggestions, deprecated, replaced_by, docs_url, requires_type_checking, recommended)
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: https://a.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules:
  - id: g-x-001
    name: x
    description: x
    detector: x
recommended_set: []
all_set: [g-x-001]
' > file.yaml
